runners.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 407m at this track in a handy 23.56 beating Panther Potter. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (24.47) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 8 length fourth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Leading chance.
